title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India:
Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India!
